title: Old Elysium
description: Tech overhaul mod with Steampunk, Cyberpunk, and Biopunk aesthetics and MMORPG mechanics and features.
body:
## Old Elysium

The latest creation from D'Arcy Industries, here to give you the building blocks of an industry of nightmares.


Old Elysium aims to add new worlds (and a 'moon') of exploration, branching tech trees, MMORPG style classes, skills and abilities, automation and heavy industry, and many options in terms of decorations and character customization. The content added can be broken into 5 branches, Clock's Work, Elemental Industrial, Questionable Ethics, Parallel Terrestrial, and Professional Professions.


### --Progress Disclaimer--
However, currently only basic decorative blocks and items ranging from metal and bio materials to terrain blocks. This is a work in progress and it takes time to make/implement all that this mod aims to add, so please bear with us. Also of note; This mod is also designed to be played with the Create mod.
